title: Stardom's Magic
description: A mod completely overhauling Minecraft's magic system!
body:
![stardom's magic banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cbcc0ddb9268bcb0cd354ad9f8ea78df7d6a7fd.png)

Stardom's Magic is a mod that completely overhauls Minecraft's magic 

## Vanilla overhauls:
- Brewing Stand
  - The brewing stand noow tells you the recipes, and allows you to craft the potions in a single click
  - Adds the upgrade and conversion tabs to upgrade or change the potion type


## New Additions:
- Mixing Stand
  - The mixing stand allows you to mix up to 4 potions into 1
- Spellbook
  - Allows you to cast spells
  - Right-click to changle selected spell
  - Shift-right-click to open GUI
  - Left-click to cast spell
- Spell Runes
  - Inserted into the Spellbook to set what spells to case
  - Types:
    - Flame Spell Rune
      - Found in Nether Fortresses
      - Shoots a firecharge
    - Frost Spell Rune
      - Found in Igloos
      - Summons a Snow Golem
    - Ender Spell Rune
      - Found in End Cities
      - Launches an Ender Pearl
    - Thunder Spell Rune
      - Found in Desert Temples
      - Summons a Lightning Bolt
    - Wind Spell Rune
      - Found in Trial Chamber Vaults
      - Launches Wind Charges
    - Explosion Spell Rune
      - Found in Bastion Remnants
      - Shoots a Ghast Fireball
- Mana
  - A new bar
  - Each spell costs a certain amount of mana
  - Recharges over time
- Wizard
  - A Wandering Trader-like entity
  - Drops a Wizard's Hat upon death
  - Trades magical items
- Wizard's Hat
  - Can be worn
  - Can be placed
  - Right-clicking it will spawn a wizard
- Wizard's Towers
  - Various types
  - Found in all 3 dimensions
  - Contains a Mixing Stand and a Wizards Hat
- Brewing Rune
  - Used to mix potions
- Enchanting Rune
  - Used to upgrade enchantments in the Enchanting Table
- Spell Rune Upgrade
  - Used in a Rune Table to upgrade spell runes
- Rune Table
  - Used to upgrade spell runes
- Enhancement Table
  - Used to upgrade enchantments on items
- Enchantments
  - Vein Miner
    - Breaks entire veins at once
  - Timbering
    - Breaks entire trees at once
  - Stepping
    - Allows the player to walk up full blocks
  - Reaching
    - Increases the player's reach distance
    - Max of 3 levels
  - Curse of Tiny
    - Makes the player smaller
  - Curse of Huge
    - Makes the player larger
  - Swiftness
    - Makes the user faster
